items.title: Kerala Cabinet Formation LIVE: UDF finalises Kerala Cabinet list; IUML gets five ministerial posts
items.summary: Senior Congress leader Thiruvanchoor Radhakrishnan will be Speaker of Kerala Assembly; 21-member Cabinet with CM-designate Satheesan will take oath of office on May 18
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: WHO declares Ebola outbreak in DR Congo a global health emergency
items.summary: The agency added that the outbreak, with around 246 cases and 80 deaths, does not meet the criteria of pandemic emergency.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: WHO declares Ebola outbreak in DRC a global health emergency
items.summary: An Ebola outbreak caused by the rare Bundibugyo strain has killed dozens in Democratic Republic of the Congo.
